symbols.brief: An interface identifying the root object associated with a running application.
An Application class object should be created by every application that wishes to use Dali.
A class representing a scroll bar that can be used to control the scrolling of a view.
ScrollView is a scrollable container that displays content larger than its viewport.

primary_api.brief: A class representing a scroll bar that can be used to control the scrolling of a view.

members.brief: Creates an initialized ScrollBar.
members.name: New

members.brief: Sets the corner radius of the scroll bar (same for all corners).
members.name: SetBarCornerRadius

members.brief: Sets the corner radius of the scroll bar for each corner individually.
members.name: SetBarCornerRadius

members.brief: Sets the visibility of the horizontal scroll bar.
members.name: SetHorizontalScrollBarVisibility

members.brief: Sets the visibility of the vertical scroll bar.
members.name: SetVerticalScrollBarVisibility

members.brief: Gets or sets the color of the scroll bar.
members.name: GetBarColor

members.brief: Gets the corner radius of the scroll bar.
members.name: GetBarCornerRadius

members.brief: Gets or sets the minimum size of the scroll bar.
members.name: GetBarMinSize

members.brief: Gets or sets the offset of bars from the edges. This creates a small gap between the bar and the scroll bar container edges. Padding can be set using View::SetPadding() which is inherited by ScrollBar.
members.name: GetBarOffset

members.brief: Gets or sets the thickness of the scroll bar.
members.name: GetBarThickness

members.brief: Gets the visibility of the horizontal scroll bar.
members.name: GetHorizontalScrollBarVisibility

members.brief: Gets or sets the current scroll position of the target view.
members.name: GetScrollPosition

members.brief: Gets the target view for which the scroll bar is responsible.
members.name: GetTarget

members.brief: Gets the visibility of the vertical scroll bar.
members.name: GetVerticalScrollBarVisibility

members.brief: Downcasts a handle to ScrollBar handle.
members.name: DownCast

members.brief: Hides the scroll bar (fade out).
members.name: HideBar

members.brief: Creates an uninitialized ScrollBar handle.
members.name: ScrollBar

members.brief: Move constructor.
members.name: ScrollBar

members.brief: Copy constructor.
members.name: ScrollBar

members.brief: Updates the size of the scroll bar based on the given scroll area and viewport size.
members.name: UpdateBarSize
members.signature: void UpdateBarSize(float scrollWidth, float scrollHeight, float viewportWidth, float viewportHeight) override

members.brief: Updates the scroll position of the scroll bar based on the given position.
members.name: UpdateScrollPosition

members.brief: Move assignment operator.
members.name: operator=

members.brief: Copy assignment operator.
members.name: operator=

members.name: ~ScrollBar
